title: TechnicalDNA
description: A complete Technical DNA document for an application instance. Composes environments, providers, constructs, variables, and cells into a single deployable infrastructure definition.

environments.description: The named deployment contexts for this application.

providers.description: The external platforms backing this application's constructs.

constructs.description: The named infrastructure components shared across cells. Declared once, referenced by many.

variables.description: Environment variables and secrets available to cells.

scripts.description: Concrete implementations of Operational Equations — each maps a named Equation to a deployed compute Construct.

cells.description: The deployed units that consume DNA and produce running software or infrastructure.

views.description: Architecture diagram views — named perspectives showing system topology as interactive node/connection/zone diagrams.
